nasb.text: For John the Baptist has come eating no bread and drinking no wine, and you say, ‘He has a demon!’

esv.text: For John the Baptist has come     eating no bread and     drinking no wine, and you say, ‘He has a demon.’

cnv.text: 因為施洗的約翰來了，不吃飯，不喝酒，你們說他是鬼附的。

ccb.text: 施洗者约翰来了，禁食禁酒，你们就说他被鬼附身了；

csbs.text: “因为施洗者      约翰来了，不吃饼，也不喝酒，你们就说：‘他有鬼魔附身！’
